overview: Personalized TRT and BHRT care delivered via telehealth by US-licensed physicians, with treatment decisions based on lab work and clinical evaluation. Plans include protocol-driven monitoring, dose adjustments, and direct provider access within 24 hours.
highlights: Lab-driven approach with required baseline testing and 90-day follow-up cadence
Direct provider access with 24-hour response times
Also offers GLP-1 weight management, sexual health services, hair restoration, and wellness injections
targetAudience: Men and women seeking personalized, lab-driven hormone therapy with clinical oversight and ongoing provider support.
